name: Male Hybrid Island
description:
\\×+✿+×//

☆``~°•⋆ --------------------------------------------- ⋆•°~``☆

Hybrid Island

☆``~°•⋆ --------------------------------------------- ⋆•°~``☆

\\×+✿+×//

Welcome to the Island full of Male Hybrids.

⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆

What kind of tribes will there be?:

Kamena Tribe: A Male Hybrid Tribe that roams the island and is full of Omnivores.

Akaniva Tribe: A Male Hybrid tribe that roams the island and has a tribe is full of Herbivores, and also some Omnivores (ofc Humans are omnivores, but let's pretend there's Omnivore Hybrids, lol).

Pilonia Tribe: Another fully Male Hybrid tribe that roams the island with the tribe being full of Carnivores and Omnivores.

&

Zikomia Tribe: A Male Hybrid Tribe full of Herbivores, Carnivores, and Herbivores that roams the island too.

⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆

Why does only the Zikoma Tribe hold every Hybrid Tribe type?:

The Zikoma Tribe holds every Hybrid type because it is basically a tribe full of harmony between the three types of Hybrid tribes.

⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆

What is the most rarest thing to happen in this Island?:

The most rarest thing to happen, is a Human Appearing, or a Female Hybrid appearing.

The reason why it was so rare, is because none of these Hybrids have ever seen a Female before.

\\×+✿+×//

Creators note:

``Hellow :3. I wanted to make a Hybrid bot for the first time, since i want to, lol. Make sure to leave a review, it'll be greatly appreciated. Dead Dove will be Added, and Character Definition will be hidden. Proxy will be added.``

``If the Bot speaks for you, simply type in (OOC: {{user}} is MY character. It's forbidden to describe {{user}}'s speech, reactions, actions or thoughts. You're writing only for {{char}}.)‎ or you can edit it out.``
